Description: Large 24/7 travel stop at I-40 exit 193 (US-63) opened in 2019. 132 truck parking spaces, 10 diesel/DEF lanes, 7 showers, laundry, CAT scale, RV dump, dog park, Chester's Chicken, Godfather's Pizza and Subway. On-site Speedco and truck wash.

Independent 24-hour Citgo-branded truck stop at I-40 exit 193. About 25 truck parking spots, 4 fuel lanes, 2 showers, convenience store, restaurant, on-site motel, tire sales/repair, towing and mechanical services.

24-hour independent auto/truck stop at I-40 exit 183 (AR-13). About 19 truck parking spots, 4 fuel lanes, 3 showers, convenience store, deli/fast food, trailer drop, RV parking. Fuel brand also listed as Phillips 66 in some directories. Lot is small for larger combinations per driver reviews.

24/7 Road Ranger travel center at I-40 exit 216 (US-49). 81 truck parking spaces, 8 diesel lanes, 6 showers, CAT scale, bulk DEF, convenience store, Wendy's, Tejas Tacos, Dan's Big Slice Pizza and Road Ranger Kitchen.

Pilot Company ONE9 Travel Center at I-40 exit 216 (US-49), open 24/7. Truck parking for semis and bobtails, diesel and DEF lanes, showers reservable via the Pilot app, CAT scale, laundry, ATM, check cashing, propane. Southern Tire Mart truck tire shop on site.

Small independent 24-hour fuel stop and diner at I-40 exit 221 (AR-78) in Wheatley. About 20 truck parking spaces (mix of paved and unpaved), sit-down diner, deli and ATM. Limited services; recent reviews confirm it remains open.

24/7 Love's Travel Stop at I-40 exit 233 (AR-261), Palestine. About 90 truck parking spaces, 8 fuel/DEF lanes, 5 showers, CAT scale, bulk DEF, tire care with 2 truck service bays, RV dump, Subway and Chester's Fried Chicken.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Love's Travel Stop #759
Description: Certified CAT Scale located at Love's Travel Stop #759, I-40 exit 193 (US-63), Hazen. Available 24/7 with the travel stop.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Road Ranger Brinkley
Description: Certified CAT Scale at the Road Ranger travel center, I-40 exit 216 (US-49), Brinkley. Available 24/7 with the travel center.

Business Name: CAT Scale at ONE9 Travel Center Brinkley
Description: Certified CAT Scale at the ONE9 Travel Center (Pilot Company), I-40 exit 216 (US-49), Brinkley.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Love's Travel Stop #275
Description: Certified CAT Scale at Love's Travel Stop #275, I-40 exit 233 (AR-261), Palestine. Available 24/7 with the travel stop.

Commercial truck tire shop co-located with the ONE9/Pilot travel center at I-40 exit 216. Tire sales and service, roadside assistance dispatch, DOT inspections and preventative maintenance for trucks and fleets.

Fixed-location Speedco truck service shop at Love's #759, I-40 exit 193, Hazen. Oil changes, expanded tire selection, light mechanical services and DOT inspections; truck care hours approximately 6 a.m.-11 p.m.
Love's truck wash at Love's Travel Stop #759, I-40 exit 193, Hazen; one of Love's first company truck wash sites (announced 2023). Location page lists truck wash hours of approximately 7 a.m.-8 p.m.
Budget motel directly off I-40 exit 193 in Hazen with a large lot and ample free parking explicitly for trucks, buses and RVs. Free to-go breakfast and in-room WiFi; near the exit 193 truck stops.
Budget hotel at I-40 exit 216 in Brinkley offering free on-site parking with dedicated space for trucks, buses and RVs. Free light breakfast, outdoor pool and free WiFi.
Fixed-location commercial truck and diesel repair shop on N Main St (US-49) near I-40 exit 216 in Brinkley; also dispatches mobile truck and trailer repair in the Brinkley area.

Business Name: White River Rest Area (I-40 MM 199, EB and WB)
Description: HELD: Public rest area / tourist information center on I-40 at mile marker 199 near De Valls Bluff-Hazen with separate truck and car parking and restrooms. Could not retrieve an official ArDOT source (ardot.gov PDF inaccessible) and no civic address exists; site also had an extended closure for conversion to a Tourist Information Center, so current status needs official confirmation.
HELD: 24-hour Shell fuel stop with truck parking and store reported at I-40 exit 193, Hazen. Only one independent source located; current operation and details unverified.
HELD: Fuel stop with diesel and public parking listed at I-40 exit 216 & US-49, Brinkley. Only a single source (TruckMap) found and no civic street address; needs verification.
HELD: Budget motel directly off I-40 exit 193 in Hazen; one source (HotelPlanner) explicitly advertises semi truck parking, but no second independent confirmation of truck parking was found.

Business Name: Days Inn & Suites by Wyndham Brinkley
Description: HELD: Hotel at I-40 exit 216, Brinkley. Sources confirm free parking but no explicit truck-parking confirmation was found; guest reviews note the lot is difficult for trucks with trailers.
HELD: Motel at I-40 exit 183, Carlisle, adjacent to the Conoco truck stop. Sources confirm free parking but no explicit truck-parking confirmation was found.

HELD: Diesel repair business listed at 2101 N Main St, Brinkley (near I-40 exit 216) offering diesel mechanic work, tire service and roadside assistance. Two directory sources exist, but its website branding (mobilemechanicbrinkleyar.com) suggests it may operate primarily as a mobile service, and the address duplicates the ONE9 parcel; held pending confirmation it is a fixed-location shop.

New-build TA Express opened March 2024 at the Blackwell exit (site of the former Blackwell Travel Center). 100 truck parking spaces, 6 diesel lanes with DEF, 6 showers, CAT scale, driver's lounge, laundry, Sbarro and Charleys Cheesesteaks, Gulf-branded fuel, open 24/7.

Business Name: CAT Scale at TA Express Atkins
Description: CAT scale located at the TA Express Atkins travel center at I-40 Exit 101 (Blackwell exit). Scale installed with the new facility that opened in March 2024; open 24/7 with the travel center.

24-hour Love's Travel Stop at I-40 Exit 107 in Morrilton. 4 diesel lanes, bulk DEF, roughly 17-20 truck parking spaces, 3 showers, Subway and Godfather's Pizza on site, convenience store, ATM and WiFi.

Independent 24-hour Shell-branded truck stop at the Morgan interchange (I-40 Exit 142). Paved overnight truck parking (sources report 35-50 spaces), 4 fuel lanes, certified truck scales (not CAT), convenience store with Chester's Chicken and deli, truckers lounge, ATM; McDonald's and Waffle House adjacent.

24-hour independent truck stop on AR-365 at the Morgan interchange (I-40 Exit 142), across from the Morgan Shell. Free truck parking, showers, convenience store with restaurant/deli, ATM. Some listings show the location under RoadRunner branding; verify signage on arrival.

Dedicated paid truck and trailer parking lot in Conway on Harkrider Street (US-65B) near I-40 Exit 125. Fully fenced gravel yard with 24/7 gated access via personalized gate code, security cameras, and daily, weekly and monthly rates for tractor-trailers, bobtails, box trucks and trailers. Bookable through Truck Parking Club.

Fixed-location commercial tire shop on AR-365 in Mayflower, just off I-40 Exit 135. Handles semi truck and trailer tires with sales, flat repair and mounting, plus mechanical services; shop hours Mon-Fri 8-5, Sat 9-2, with 24-hour emergency roadside tire service also offered from this location.

Best Western hotel on Oak Street (US-64) just off I-40 Exit 127 in Conway. Property amenity listings include free RV/truck parking with a large lot able to accommodate a truck with trailer; free breakfast, WiFi, outdoor pool and fitness center.

Budget motel on N Oak Street (AR-95) at I-40 Exit 107 in Morrilton, a short walk from the Love's Travel Stop. Free parking lot with room for semis, trailers and refrigerated trucks per property and guest-review listings; 24-hour front desk, guest laundry and free WiFi.

Business Name: Little Rock Truck Parking - Conway Lot
Description: HELD: Operator advertises a secure gated Conway lot 0.5 miles from I-40 Exit 125 with about 40 spaces, lighting, 24/7 access and rates from $20/day, but publishes no street address; only operator-controlled sources found. Possible overlap with the Hendricks Harkrider Street lot could not be ruled out.

HELD: Directory listings place a Mapco Express fuel stop with 3 diesel lanes, DEF, deli and about 10 overnight truck spaces at I-40 Exit 129 in Conway, and the Arkansas DEQ facility record shows 'Active', but no source could confirm the store is currently operating under this brand in 2025-2026 (a nearby Conway Mapco Mart shows CLOSED on some listings). Needs a current-status check before publishing.

HELD: Third-party rest-area directories list state truck-parking turnouts on I-40 at mile 134 (both directions) between Mayflower and Conway with no facilities. Publication requires an official Arkansas source (ardot.gov) plus a civic address; the ARDOT rest-area PDF could not be retrieved and no civic address exists for a highway turnout.

HELD: Listed in one truck-service directory as a Conway I-40 shop offering truck/trailer tire repair, new/used/recap tires, oil changes and minor repairs, but only a single source was found and no street address or current-operation confirmation.

24/7 AmBest travel center at I-40 Exit 35 (AR-23/Pence Lane) in Ozark, formerly known as The I-40 Travel Center, with two on-site restaurants (including the Hillbilly Hideout), showers, laundry, CAT scales, truck repair, DEF at the pump, and 24-hour security. Sources report roughly 80 truck parking spaces and 8 diesel lanes.

24-hour Love's Travel Stop at I-40 Exit 37 (AR-219) in Ozark with 4 diesel fuel lanes, 3 showers, Subway fast food, trucker store, bulk DEF, certified scales, and a lighted paved parking lot. Sources report differing truck parking counts (11-19 spaces), so no count is published.

24-hour independent truck stop and convenience store on US-71 at I-40 Exit 13 in Alma, with fuel, ATM, and truck parking in a lighted paved lot. RV parking is also available, with restaurants and a motel nearby.

Independent 24-hour truck stop about 0.3 miles from I-40 Exit 20 near Mulberry, known for its restaurant serving both authentic Indian cuisine and American fare. Facilities include about 20 truck parking spots, 5 fuel lanes, 2 showers, 24-hour diesel, deli, ATM, and truckers lounge.
24-hour truck wash at I-40 Exit 5 (Fayetteville Rd/AR-59) in Van Buren, in business for over 35 years. Washes everything from small vehicles to diesel rigs and washes out most trailers.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Workman's Travel Center
Description: CAT scale located at Workman's Travel Center at I-40 Exit 35 (AR-23) in Ozark. Confirmed by the travel center's own amenity listing and the AllStays CAT scale directory for Arkansas.

Fixed heavy-duty truck facility on US-64 (Alma Hwy) near I-40 Exit 13 in Alma offering 24/7 heavy-duty towing and recovery, truck repair, and new/used truck parts and wrecker equipment. Shop hours are 8am-5pm Monday-Friday; Wreckmaster certified.

Truck and trailer repair company with a full shop facility on US-64 (Alma Hwy) near I-40 Exit 13 in Alma, plus 24/7 roadside service. Services include DOT inspections, mechanical/electrical/AC repairs, brakes, suspensions, welding, and new and used tire sales and service; shop hours 9am-5pm Monday-Friday, with Detroit Diesel factory-trained technicians.
48-room hotel on US-71 at I-40 Exit 13 in Alma with explicitly advertised free RV/bus/truck parking on site. Also offers free WiFi and free grab-and-go breakfast.
31-room budget motel off I-40 Exit 35 and US-64 in Ozark that explicitly lists truck and bus parking among its amenities. Also offers continental breakfast and pet-friendly rooms.

Business Name: Arkansas Welcome Center at Van Buren/Fort Smith (I-40 EB, MM 2)
Truck Parking Club - Pence Ln lot behind Workman's Travel Center
Petro Stopping Center #326 (Petro N. Little Rock)
Description: Large TA/Petro travel center at the Galloway/Protho Junction cluster, I-40 Exit 161. Approx. 250 truck parking spaces with Reserve-It reserved parking, 10 diesel lanes, 14 showers, Iron Skillet restaurant, laundry, CAT scale, trucker lounge, CB shop, and on-site TA Truck Service shop. Open 24 hours.

Pilot travel center at I-40 Exit 161 (Galloway Rd), part of the Protho Junction truck-stop cluster. About 100 truck parking spaces including 24 reserved/paid Prime Parking spots, 7 showers (reservable via the Pilot app), 11 fuel lanes, CAT scale, and convenience store food. Open 24 hours.

Love's travel stop at I-40 Exit 161 in the Galloway/Protho Junction cluster. Approx. 65 truck parking spaces, 5 showers, 8 fuel lanes, CAT scale, bulk DEF, laundry, WiFi, and food options including Chester's Fried Chicken and Godfather's Pizza. Speedco truck care is adjacent. Open 24 hours.

Circle K/Valero fuel stop and convenience store at I-40 Exit 175 in Lonoke (formerly a Cracker Box/Flash Market travel center). Truck diesel with satellite pumps and roughly 28 truck parking spots, ATM, paved lot, and WiFi. No showers or service bays listed. Open 24 hours.

Business Name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of Little Rock
Description: Blue Beacon exterior truck and trailer wash at I-40 Exit 161, located in the Galloway/Protho Junction truck-stop cluster next to the Petro and Pilot. Open 24 hours.

Business Name: TA Truck Service #326 (at Petro N. Little Rock)
Description: Fixed TA Truck Service shop at the Petro Stopping Center, I-40 Exit 161. Six service bays with tires, brakes, electrical, DOT inspections, alignments, HVAC, aftertreatment, and advanced diagnostics. Open 24 hours; Bridgestone/Michelin commercial tire dealer.

Speedco (Love's Truck Care) fixed shop at I-40 Exit 161 offering commercial truck tires, oil/lube service, and light mechanical work. Michelin commercial tire dealer, adjacent to the Love's Travel Stop in the Galloway cluster.
Commercial truck tire dealer and service shop on Valentine Rd at I-40 Exit 161. Bridgestone/Firestone commercial dealer serving trucks and trailers. Hours: Mon-Fri 7:30am-5pm, Sat 8am-12pm.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Petro Stopping Center #326
Description: Certified CAT scale located at the Petro Stopping Center, I-40 Exit 161, North Little Rock. Available 24 hours with the travel center.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Pilot Travel Center #332
Description: Certified CAT scale at the Pilot Travel Center, I-40 Exit 161 (Galloway Rd), North Little Rock. Available 24 hours with the travel center.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Love's Travel Stop #236
Description: Certified CAT scale at the Love's Travel Stop, I-40 Exit 161, North Little Rock. Available 24 hours with the travel stop.

Independent trucker-oriented motel at I-40 Exit 161, next door to the Pilot Travel Center and Blue Beacon truck wash in the Galloway cluster. Big-rig parking on site and a discounted rate for CDL holders; rooms with microwave and refrigerator, free WiFi.

Budget motel at I-40 Exit 175 in Lonoke with explicitly advertised free truck, bus, and RV parking (large-vehicle outdoor lot). Free continental breakfast, outdoor pool, pet friendly. Near the Exit 175 fuel stops.

Listed in fuel directories as a truck-parking fuel stop at I-40 Exit 157 (Hwy 161), but current operation/branding could not be confirmed; nearby listings at 2500-2511 Hwy 161 show Alon and Prothro Superstop branding, suggesting the site may have been rebranded or closed.

Business Name: Holiday Inn Express & Suites Lonoke I-40 (Exit 175)
Description: Hotel at I-40 Exit 175, Lonoke. One booking site (HotelPlanner) states bus and truck parking is available, but the IHG official page does not explicitly confirm truck parking.
Motel described by one booking site as off I-40 near Exit 153A with free parking including room for semi-trucks.
Large Love's Travel Stop opened June 2022 at I-40 Exit 57 with 114 truck parking spaces, 10 showers, CAT scale, laundry, dog park, and on-site Speedco truck care.
24-hour Pilot Travel Center at I-40 Exit 84 with 130 truck parking spaces, 7 diesel lanes, 5 showers, Subway and Wendy's, CAT scale, laundry, and WiFi.
24-hour Flying J Travel Center at I-40 Exit 84 with 175 truck parking spots (15 reserved), 10 fuel lanes, 15 showers, Denny's restaurant, and CAT scale.
Independent Exxon Tiger Mart auto/truck center at I-40 Exit 55 (US-64 W) with truck parking, restaurant/deli, store, and showers; open 24 hours.

Bookable 24/7 truck and trailer parking in a fenced, keypad-gated gravel lot with video surveillance at a self-storage facility off AR-7 (S Arkansas Ave), south of I-40 Exit 81. Hourly, daily, weekly, and monthly booking via Truck Parking Club.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Pilot Travel Center #430
Description: Certified CAT scale at the Pilot Travel Center, I-40 Exit 84.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Flying J Travel Center #605
Description: Certified CAT scale at the Flying J Travel Center, I-40 Exit 84.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Love's Travel Stop #822
Description: Certified CAT scale at Love's Travel Stop #822, I-40 Exit 57.

Business Name: Speedco at Love's Travel Stop #822 (Love's Truck Care)
Description: Speedco truck lube and tire shop at Love's #822, I-40 Exit 57: oil change/PM services, light mechanical, wide commercial tire selection (Bridgestone, Michelin, Goodyear, retreads), and emergency roadside assistance dispatched from a fixed shop.

Business Name: Fleet Tire Point S (Fleet Tire & Retreading)
Description: Full-service commercial tire dealer and retreader on AR-7 south of I-40 Exit 81; tire sales, installation, retreads, and 24/7 tire road service. Mon-Fri 7:30am-5pm, Sat 8am-12pm.
24/7 truck wash and trailer washouts on Interstate Ave near I-40 Exit 84.
24/7 cargo tank cleaning facility (food-grade and Kosher certified) near I-40 Exit 84, affiliated with Quick Truck Wash.
Independent truck wash at I-40 Exit 57 in Clarksville. Mon-Fri 7am-8pm, Sat 7am-4pm, closed Sunday.
Exterior-corridor motel just off I-40 Exit 55 with explicit truck parking: about 10 truck spaces in back and room for wide loads. Pet friendly, free WiFi, 24-hour front desk.

Business Name: Fleet Masters Truck & Trailer Repair of Arkansas
Description: Fixed-location shop on AR-7 south of I-40 Exit 81 offering in-shop medium/heavy-duty truck and trailer repair plus 24-hour roadside service, tire repair, and fleet maintenance. Registered with FMCSA (USDOT 2593908).

Family-owned 24/7 heavy, medium, and light-duty towing, recovery, and roadside assistance with a fixed shop (in-shop welding, mechanical work, RV and bus repairs) near I-40 Exit 55; serving the area since 1997.

HELD: Listed at I-40 Exit 58 with truck parking, deli, showers, laundromat, and repair, but only in stale-prone aggregator directories (Find Truck Service, Roadnow); no recent official or review-site confirmation that it is currently operating under this name.
HELD: Appears only in older directory data at I-40 Exit 57; Love's #822 opened at this exit in 2022 and current independent operation could not be confirmed.
HELD: Bookable bobtail/box-truck/dump-truck parking (vehicles up to 36 ft, no full tractor-trailers) about 5 miles from I-40 Exit 81; only source is the Truck Parking Club listing itself.
HELD: Truck parking mentioned only in a single Tripadvisor guest review ('Truck Parking, Smoking Rooms'); no second explicit confirmation of semi truck parking found.

HELD: Allstays CAT scale directory lists an Ozark I-40 scale (shown as Exit 35, phone 479-667-0711) but the exit number conflicts with Love's #271 at Exit 37 and the Love's amenity listings found do not confirm a CAT scale; single ambiguous source.

Large Pilot Flying J travel center in the West Memphis truck-stop cluster at I-40 Exit 280 (I-40/I-55 corridor). Approx. 225 truck parking spots (33 reserved/paid), showers, public laundry, CAT scale, DEF lanes, game room, premium WiFi; Southern Tire Mart and Blue Beacon on site.

24-hour Pilot travel center on Martin Luther King Jr Dr in the West Memphis cluster (directory sources list I-40 Exit 280; I-40/I-55 corridor). About 150 truck parking spots (17 reserved/paid), 11 showers, CAT scale, laundry, deli/fast food, trucker store and lounge, WiFi.

Full-service Petro (TravelCenters of America) stopping center at I-40 Exit 280 / I-55 Exit 4. Approx. 280 truck parking spots (63 reserved/paid), 17 showers, Iron Skillet restaurant, laundry, scale, TA Truck Service shop with 6 bays, driver lounge, gym, barber, WiFi.

24-hour Love's Travel Stop in the West Memphis cluster; directory sources list I-40 Exit 280 (I-40/I-55 corridor, MLK Dr). About 111 truck parking spots, 10 showers, CAT scale, deli/fast food, bulk DEF, lighted paved lot, WiFi.

Full-service TA travel center at I-40 Exit 260 (Earle/Crawfordsville area). Large truck lot with Reserve-It paid parking (sources report 137-170 spaces), 9 showers, CAT scale, truck wash, TA Truck Service shop with 6 bays, laundry, Pizza Hut Express/Taco Bell Express/Burger King, game room, pet area.

Independent travel center (Valero-branded fuel) at I-40 Exit 260 near Earle, across Highway 149 from TA Earle. Truck parking, deli/restaurant, laundry, scales, travel store and truck wash services per truck-stop directories.

Small 24-hour fuel stop/convenience store with truck parking at I-40 Exit 256 (Hwy 75, Heth). Directories report about 15 parking spaces, 5 diesel lanes, deli and showers, with overnight parking permitted.
Independent 24-hour truck stop (76/Sunoco-branded fuel) at I-40 Exit 247 (AR-38 E toward Widener/Hughes). Diesel, convenience store, food and restrooms; the only service listed at this exit.

Business Name: Arkansas Welcome Center at West Memphis
Description: Official ARDOT-listed welcome center/rest area on I-40 westbound at mile marker 278 in West Memphis, the first Arkansas stop after crossing the Mississippi River. Separate truck and passenger parking, 24/7 restrooms, water, picnic tables, WiFi and travel information.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Flying J Travel Center #607
Description: CAT Scale certified truck scale located at the Flying J Travel Center, I-40 Exit 280, West Memphis.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Pilot Travel Center #429
Description: CAT Scale certified truck scale located at Pilot Travel Center #429 in the West Memphis truck-stop cluster (I-40 Exit 280 per directory sources).

Business Name: CAT Scale at Petro Stopping Center #311
Description: CAT Scale certified truck scale at the Petro Stopping Center, I-40 Exit 280 / I-55 Exit 4, West Memphis.

Business Name: CAT Scale at Love's Travel Stop #450
Description: CAT Scale certified truck scale at Love's Travel Stop #450, West Memphis (I-40 Exit 280 per directory sources).
CAT Scale certified truck scale at the TA Earle travel center, I-40 Exit 260.

Commercial truck tire dealer and service center on the I-40 north service road in West Memphis. New and retread commercial tires, 24/7 roadside tire service, air/hydraulic brake work, DOT inspections, wheel balancing and fleet inspections.

Business Name: Southern Tire Mart at Pilot Flying J
Description: Southern Tire Mart commercial tire shop located on-site at the Flying J Travel Center, I-40 Exit 280, West Memphis. Truck tire sales, repair and replacement for drivers using the Flying J complex.

24-hour Love's Speedco truck lube and tire shop on Petro Rd in the West Memphis truck-stop cluster. Commercial tire sales and repair, oil changes, light mechanical work and emergency roadside assistance.

Goodyear commercial truck tire and service center adjacent to Love's Travel Stop on Martin Luther King Dr in the West Memphis I-40/I-55 truck-stop cluster. Commercial tire sales, repair and fleet service.

Business Name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of West Memphis (Flying J)
Description: 24-hour Blue Beacon truck wash located by the Flying J Travel Center at I-40 Exit 280 / I-55 Exit 4 in West Memphis. Exterior washes, trailer washouts and related services.

Business Name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash (Petro West Memphis)
Description: Blue Beacon truck wash (listed as Blue Beacon of Memphis) located at the Petro Stopping Center complex on Petro Dr/Rd, West Memphis. Exterior truck and trailer washes.

Independent hand truck wash in the Petro Rd truck-stop area of West Memphis. Hand washes, wheel and aluminum polishing, interior detail, hopper/dry van/end dump washouts, plus an on-site CB shop and radio repair.

Business Name: Comfort Suites West Memphis I-40 I-55
Description: Hotel at the I-40/I-55 junction in West Memphis with explicitly advertised free truck, bus and RV parking. Free hot breakfast, WiFi, indoor pool, fitness center and guest laundry.

Business Name: Days Inn by Wyndham Forrest City
Description: Budget hotel at I-40 Exit 241 in Forrest City with explicitly advertised free RV/bus/truck parking for vehicles of all sizes. Seasonal outdoor pool and free self parking.

Business Name: TA Truck Service - Petro West Memphis
Description: Fixed TA Truck Service repair facility with 6 truck service bays at the Petro Stopping Center, I-40 Exit 280 / I-55 Exit 4, West Memphis. Light mechanical, oil changes, tires and DOT-level maintenance.

Fixed TA Truck Service shop with 6 service bays at the TA Earle travel center, I-40 Exit 260. Truck alignment, DOT inspections, brake, HVAC and electrical service, J-PRO diagnostics, reefer services and road service dispatch.

ASE-certified independent diesel truck repair shop in West Memphis with a fixed facility on Balfour Rd; offers diesel engine repair, brake repair and 24-hour roadside assistance/towing dispatch from the shop.

Business Name: Arkansas Highway Police Weigh Station - I-40 Eastbound (Lehi / West Memphis)
Description: AHP District 5 (Crittenden County) weigh station on I-40 eastbound near Lehi at approx. mile marker 273.5-274, serving traffic approaching West Memphis. HELD: confirmed by official ARDOT AHP weigh station map, but no civic street address available from official sources (mailing address is PO Box 2126, West Memphis, AR 72303).

Business Name: Arkansas Highway Police Weigh Station - I-40 Westbound (Riverside / West Memphis)
Description: AHP District 5 (Crittenden County) I-40 westbound weigh station (listed as Riverside) serving trucks entering Arkansas from Memphis. HELD: appears on official ARDOT AHP weigh station material, but no civic street address or confirmed mile marker available from official sources.

Business Name: Forrest City Rest Area - I-40 Eastbound (MM 235)
Description: State rest area on I-40 eastbound at mile marker 235 near Forrest City with separate truck parking, restrooms, water and picnic tables. HELD: listed in the official ARDOT welcome centers/rest areas PDF, but no civic street address is published by official sources.

Business Name: Forrest City Rest Area - I-40 Westbound (MM 242.6)
Description: State rest area on I-40 westbound at mile marker 242.6 near Forrest City with RV/truck parking, restrooms and vending. HELD: listed in the official ARDOT welcome centers/rest areas PDF, but no civic street address is published by official sources.

Small independent truck stop at I-40 Exit 271 on US-70 near Lehi with about 25 truck parking spaces, deli/restaurant, trucker lounge and travel store. HELD: sources conflict on current branding (PJ's Country Store vs Jump Stop/Valero) and on city/ZIP (Lehi/Marion 72364 vs Proctor 72376); current operating status not confirmed by two consistent sources.

Hotel on the I-40 service road in West Memphis. HELD: truck parking is claimed only by one source (Expedia lists RV/bus/truck parking); no second explicit truck-parking confirmation found, and sources conflict on E Service Rd vs S Service Rd address.

Extended-stay motel on the I-40 west service road advertising truck parking. HELD: truck-parking confirmation comes only from the operator's own G6 Hospitality sites (studio6.com/motel6.com); no independent second source found.

Motel on the I-40/I-55 service road with bus and truck parking mentioned by a booking site. HELD: only one source explicitly confirms truck parking, and listings suggest the property may have rebranded (some OTA pages now show Rodeway Inn West Memphis at this location).

Motel near the I-40/I-55 convergence that markets itself as convenient for bus and truck travelers. HELD: no explicit truck-parking amenity confirmation found from any source, and no verified street address collected.
